name: Crab Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain spinach noodles while doing the following: Drain mushrooms, but RESERVE LIQUID; set aside.
2. Melt diet margarine in a small saucepan. Add onion and celery; sauté over low heat for 3 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms and flour to the saucepan; stir until flour is well blended.
4. Add crabmeat and sherry; cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
5. Combine sour cream substitute with the reserved mushroom liquid, stirring well.
6. Add the sour cream mixture and seasonings (salt and pepper) to the crab mixture, stirring well.
7. Add 2 tablespoons of diet margarine to the cooked, drained spinach noodles and arrange the noodles on a serving platter.
8. Spoon the crabmeat mixture over the noodles.
